nasb.text: For indeed, the Son of Man is going as it has been determined; but woe to that man by whom He is betrayed!”

esv.text: For the Son of Man goes as it has been determined, but woe to that man by whom he is betrayed!”

cnv.text: 人子固然要照所預定的離世，但出賣人子的那人有禍了！”

ccb.text: 按照所定的，人子要死去，但那出卖人子的人有祸了！”

csbs.text: 因为人子确实要按照所决定的离去。不过出卖人子的那个人有祸了。”
